honest_framing: Model targets 180d horizon. 15-day delivery requires KENNAMET-style overshoot. The probabilities below are MODEL-SAID for 180d; 15d probability is lower.

pick.honest_15d_probability_estimates_lower: 15d overshoot of 30pct estimated 10-15pct (vs 48pct over 180d). KENNAMET delivered 18pct in 1 day - real, but rare.
pick.exit_rule: target hit OR SL hit OR 15d elapsed

constitution_caveats: §1.1 Honesty: 15-30% in 15d is NOT what model says. Model says 87pct chance of +5pct over 180d. 15d delivery of 15-30pct is an overshoot bet.
§1.4 Bonferroni: alpha/15 not cleared - sub-conviction signal
§1.5 Macro filter cascade is RISK_OFF - user override required to trade
Per realized_outcomes/kennamet_20260508.json: KENNAMET (s15=0.82) delivered +18.1pct in 1 day. CONSOFINVT has lower conviction (s15=0.64) but similar setup type.
